heroHeadline: BTS Returns: 'ARIRANG' Album Breaks Records, Gwanghwamun Concert Draws 18.4M Netflix Viewers
heroSubtitle: Tracking 4,670+ days of K-pop history — from debut to UN podiums, military service, and the most-anticipated group comeback of 2026: 'ARIRANG' released March 20, Arirang World Tour kicking off April 9.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, and Recording Academy.
